title: SANTIAM WOMEN'S CLINIC - 211info
text: SANTIAM WOMEN'S CLINIC SANTIAM WOMEN'S CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a range of women’s health care, including annual exams, female sterilization and family planning including prenatal care and delivery. 1373 N 10th Avenue Stayton, OR 97383 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (503) 769-9522 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 769-9522 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Varies by service. OHP and most private insurance accepted. Financial assistance may be available. DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Childbirth Education Contraception Doula Services Midwifery Obstetrics/Gynecology Prenatal Care Sterilization * Women Women's Health Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
